summary: Full E2E testing of PodcastMe P0 upgrades. All critical flows working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Copy button shows '⎘ Hook' instead of '✓ Copied' after click - likely clipboard API unavailable in test browser context (not a real user-facing bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 upgrades verified working. HeroScreen: particles(10), orb, badge all visible. VoiceSetupScreen: form fills and submits. ConversationScreen: loads immediately in text mode (no 12s wait), 'Voice mode coming soon' badge present, 'Run Demo' button top-right, Jordan avatar with idle waveform, Q1 shown. Demo Mode: clicking Run Demo immediately triggers GenerationScreen with Gemini API call (real). OutputScreen: TTS hero section above bento grid confirmed (heroTop=213 < bentoTop=499), all 8 bento cards (hook/persona/script/show-notes/audiogram/cta/tags/tweets) visible, sticky playback bar, New Episode restarts to HeroScreen.
